---
title: Expectation and Variance
description: Center and spread of random variables.
---

::: {.learning-objectives}
### Learning Objectives

- Interpret expectation as long-run average.
- Interpret variance as spread.
- Connect probability to statistics.
:::

Expectation tells us the average value over many repetitions. Variance tells us
how much values tend to vary around that average.

::: {.practice-box}
1. What does high variance suggest?
2. Why is expected value not always a guaranteed outcome?
3. How does variance relate to risk?
:::
